data.title: Algorand (ALGO) introduces xChain Accounts for MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, and Rabby users to use Algorand dApps easily.
data.description: Algorand, a leading blockchain platform, recently introduced xChain Accounts, facilitating smooth access for users of MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, and Rabby to Algorand decentralized applications (dApps). This new feature enables a user-friendly experience for those interacting with the Algorand ecosystem. The launch of xChain Accounts brings significant benefits to Algorand (ALGO) users and aims to increase the platform's accessibility and usability. This update demonstrates the commitment of Algorand to enhance the dApp experience for its users.

data.title: Google Translate hits 20 years, offering AI-powered pronunciation, 250 languages, and real-time upgrades.
data.description: Google Translate is marking its 20th anniversary by rolling out new AI-powered pronunciation tools, extending support to a whopping 250 languages, and introducing real-time translation improvements. This milestone highlights the platform's continuous evolution and commitment to providing accessible and accurate translations to users worldwide.

data.title: Virtune launches the Virtune Hyperliquid ETP on Deutsche Börse Xetra
data.description: On April 29th, 2026, Swedish crypto asset manager Virtune revealed the listing of the Virtune Hyperliquid ETP on Deutsche Börse Xetra in Germany. Virtune, a Swedish company specializing in physically backed crypto exchange-traded products (ETPs), has secured the confidence of more than 160,000 investors since its establishment in 2023. As of now, Virtune oversees approximately USD 300 million in assets under management (AUM), solidifying its stature as a premier provider of regulated crypto ETPs in Europe.

data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Taipei, ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. (TWSE: 3711, NYSE: ASX), known as ASEH, disclosed its latest financial report. The company is a prominent player in semiconductor assembly and testing services (ATM) as well as electronic manufacturing services (EMS).

data.title: Quzhou invites world to reimagine Chinese character 'li'
data.description: In Quzhou, China, on April 29, 2026, an announcement was made regarding a global campaign initiated by the historic city in the Zhejiang province. The campaign calls for innovative reimaginings of the Chinese character "li" (礼), commonly associated with concepts like "ritual," "etiquette," and "respect." This initiative aims to gather diverse perspectives on the character from around the world. The city of Quzhou is leading this effort to engage a broad audience and promote cultural exchange.
